mapper.select:
SELECT cc.class_id, cc.class_name, cc.people_limit, cc.status, IFNULL(t.start_time, '') AS start_time, IFNULL(t.end_time, '') AS end_time, IFNULL(c.title, '배정없음') AS title, IFNULL(c.start_date, '') AS start_date, IFNULL(c.end_date, '') AS end_date, IFNULL(c.course_id, '') AS course_id, IFNULL(u1.name, '-') AS professor_name, IFNULL(u2.name, '-') AS sub_prof_name FROM course_class cc LEFT JOIN course c ON cc.class_id = c.class_id LEFT JOIN course_time t ON c.time_code = t.time_code LEFT JOIN tb_userinfo u1 ON c.professor = u1.loginID LEFT JOIN tb_userinfo u2 ON c.sub_prof = u2.loginID
AND cc.class_name IN ( SELECT DISTINCT inner_cc.class_name FROM course_class inner_cc WHERE inner_cc.status = 1 )
AND cc.class_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{_parameter}, '%')
ORDER BY cc.class_name ASC, t.start_time ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_class
AND class_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course_class(class_name, people_limit, status) VALUES(#{class_name}, #{people_limit}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT c.course_id, cc.class_id, cc.class_name, cc.people_limit, t.start_time, t.end_time, c.title, c.start_date, c.end_date, u1.name AS professor_name, u2.name AS sub_prof_name FROM course_class cc LEFT JOIN course c ON cc.class_id = c.class_id LEFT JOIN course_time t ON c.time_code = t.time_code LEFT JOIN tb_userinfo u1 ON c.professor = u1.loginID LEFT JOIN tb_userinfo u2 ON c.sub_prof = u2.loginID WHERE cc.class_name = #{className} ORDER BY t.start_time
